decisions.decision: Test ContextRow within ConditionalEditor's test suite (integration-style, nested describe) since ContextRow is a non-exported local function and cannot be imported separately.
alternatives_rejected: Separate test file for ContextRow (impossible — not exported)
Exporting ContextRow just for testing (unnecessary coupling)

decisions.decision: Mock useMarkets and useMarket alongside useProbabilityEdit and useSession in the vi.mock('@/lib/query/hooks') block. useMarkets returns { data: { markets: MarketSummary[] } } and useMarket returns { data: { market: { outcomes: [...] } } }.
alternatives_rejected: Only mocking useProbabilityEdit (context dropdowns would be empty)
Using MSW for network-level mocking (diverges from established test patterns)

decisions.decision: No crypto.randomUUID() mock needed — Node 19+ provides it globally and TradingPanel tests already exercise this path without mocking.
alternatives_rejected: vi.stubGlobal('crypto', ...) — unnecessary since it already works

decisions.decision: Use same mutation response shape { order: { orderId: string } } as TradingPanel since both use useProbabilityEdit hitting the same endpoint.
alternatives_rejected: Different response shape — not applicable, same hook

decisions.decision: Test the notation display (P(outcome | conditions) = probability) as it's a key UX feature. Verify both unconditional and conditional notation strings.
alternatives_rejected: Skip notation testing — would miss a core feature of the component

decisions.decision: Follow TradingPanel.test.tsx patterns exactly: vi.mock with importActual for session, vi.mock for hooks, vi.mocked() for per-test control, renderWithProviders helper, same fixture structure.
alternatives_rejected: Custom test utilities — unnecessary divergence from established patterns

steps.task: Create test file frontend/src/__tests__/ConditionalEditor.test.tsx with mock setup: vi.mock session context (with importActual), vi.mock hooks (useProbabilityEdit, useMarkets, useMarket all as vi.fn()), import and vi.mocked() all mocked hooks.

Define fixtures: mockMarket (same shape as TradingPanel but distinct ids), configuredSession, unconfiguredSession, mockOtherMarkets (2-3 MarketSummary items: one active, one inactive, one matching current market.id to test filtering), mockContextMarketOutcomes (outcomes for a context market returned by useMarket), defaultMutationState helper (reuse pattern from TradingPanel).

Write beforeEach: vi.clearAllMocks, set default returns for useSession (configured), useProbabilityEdit (idle), useMarkets (returns mockOtherMarkets list), useMarket (returns context market with outcomes).
Write test: 'shows setup message when session is not configured' — set useSession to unconfigured, verify guard message text, verify no form rendered.

Write test: 'renders form with outcome select, probability slider, and submit button' — verify heading, outcome options with current probabilities, slider, submit button text ('Submit Unconditional Edit' when no context).
Write test: 'shows unconditional notation without context' — verify notation shows 'Set P(OutcomeName) = 50.0%' initially.

Write test: 'Add condition button adds a context row' — click '+ Add condition', verify a context row appears with market select and outcome select. Also test that add button is disabled when otherMarkets is empty.

Write test: 'context row market select shows only other active markets' — after adding a context row, verify the market dropdown contains only active markets that are not the current market (the inactive one and current-market-id one should be filtered out).

Write test: 'selecting a market in context row populates outcome dropdown' — add context row, select a market, verify useMarket was called with the selected market id, verify outcome options appear from the mocked useMarket response.
Write test: 'remove button removes a context row' — add a context row, click the remove (×) button, verify the row is removed.
Write test: 'notation updates when conditions are added' — add context row, select market and outcome, verify notation changes to conditional format 'P(... | variableId=outcomeId) = ...'.

Write test: 'submits correct payload with context conditions' — add context, select market+outcome, submit, verify mutate called with payload containing accountId, variableId, target, context array with valid entries only, idempotencyKey, and session.
Write test: 'submit button shows conditional text and pending state' — verify button says 'Submit Conditional Edit' when context exists, and 'Submitting…' / disabled when isPending.
Write test: 'shows success message with conditional prefix' — mock isSuccess with data, verify 'Conditional edit accepted: orderId' message.
Write test: 'shows error message when mutation fails' — mock isError with Error, verify error message rendered.
Run vitest on the new test file to verify all tests pass. Fix any failures.
